signals.headline: Solana (SOL) Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Surge | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
Solana (SOL) Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Surge | YES | MED**  
On April 14, 2026, Solana achieved an all-time high of 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions, driven by the Alpenglow consensus upgrade reducing finality to 150 milliseconds[1]. This confirmed network milestone boosts performance metrics and could shift pr

signals.headline: Solana Faces $280M+ Drift Protocol Exploit via Social Engineering | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
Solana Faces $280M+ Drift Protocol Exploit via Social Engineering | YES | HIGH**  
A recent $280M+ exploit on Drift protocol used social engineering and pre-approved transactions for admin control, with Circle declining to freeze $230M+ USDC, eroding ecosystem trust as SOL drops 13% to ~$78[4]. signals.headline: Kanye West Tweet Market Active | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Kanye West Tweet Market Active | NO | LOW confidence**

"Will Kanye tweet again by April 30?" trades at 60% YES, part of 130+ Tweet markets as of early April, but lacks evidence of X buzz, whale activity, or recent news triggers.[3] Overall, results show no breaking confirmations or trader posts on **mispriced opportunities or imminent moves**.[1][2][3][4]
